credentials.title: Credentials
credentials.description: Encrypted integration secrets (PostgreSQL pgcrypto). Use {{cred.slug}} for plain secrets or {{cred.slug.access_token}} for OAuth2 client-credentials. Set CREDENTIALS_MASTER_KEY on API and worker.
credentials.permissionsHint: Catalog designers can see names only; admins and credential managers can create and rotate secrets.
credentials.slugImmutable: Slug cannot be changed after creation.
credentials.oauth2Hint: Stored as encrypted JSON once in this credential. Automation tasks only reference the slug using
credentials.confirmDelete: Delete this credential? References in catalog automation or data sources will break.

dataSources.title: Data Sources
dataSources.description: Configure scheduled data imports from external systems via Temporal workflows.
dataSources.new: Configure a new scheduled data import
dataSources.emptyDescription: Create a data source to schedule automatic imports from external URLs or APIs.
dataSources.confirmDelete: Delete this data source and all run history?

dataSources.noRuns: No runs yet. Click "Run Now" to trigger an import.
dataSources.rowsFailed: {count} rows failed. Re-run the import to capture detailed error samples.
dataSources.upsertHelp: Rows where this field matches an existing record will be updated. Non-matching rows will be inserted.
dataSources.csvHeadersHelp: When headers are disabled, columns are named col_1, col_2, etc. Use these names in your column mapping.
dataSources.vaultHint: Reference a slug from Admin → Credentials. At import time the worker decrypts it (same slugs as catalog {{cred.slug}}). When set, bearer / OAuth client secret / SFTP password fields are not stored on save.
dataSources.oauth2Hint: Uses the OAuth 2.0 Client Credentials grant. A fresh access token is obtained before each import run.
dataSources.maxPagesHelp: Safety limit to avoid endless loops. Import stops earlier when a page returns fewer rows.
dataSources.columnMappingHelp: Map source columns to target fields. Format: {"source_column": "target_field"}.
dataSources.cronHelp: Schedule uses cron syntax (min hour day month weekday). The workflow runs in Temporal.

detail.terminateDescription: This will immediately terminate the workflow. This action cannot be undone.

catalogTasks.serviceItemPlaceholder: Search and select a service item…

detail.name: Name *
detail.automationHelp: Use state-machine format: kind: "state_machine", startAt, and states[]. Supported state types: activity, decision, delay, end, action.rest, action.ci.lookup, action.ci.create, decision.advanced. For secrets, use {{cred.slug}} with Admin → Credentials.
detail.automationHandoff: Task-to-task handoff: write values in Task 1 via mergeFormData, then read them in Task 2 with {{request.form_data.your_key}}. Set Task 2 to a higher task_order so it runs after Task 1.
